## What This Changes

Describe the change clearly.

## Why

What failure pattern, real-world incident, or standard does this address?

## Checklist

- [ ] Does not weaken any existing rule
- [ ] Does not add project-specific content to core documents
- [ ] Grounded in real-world failure prevention (not theoretical)
- [ ] Maintains separation of concerns
- [ ] No internal paths, credentials, or personal information
